title: Figure 1 from: Akamatsu Y, Kume G, Gotou M, Kono T, Fujii T, Inui R, Kurita Y (2020) Using environmental DNA analyses to assess the occurrence and abundance of the endangered amphidromous fish Plecoglossus altivelis ryukyuensis. Biodiversity Data Journal 8: e39679. https://doi.org/10.3897/BDJ.8.e39679
author: Akamatsu, Yoshihisa
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1 Maps of the study sites. Arrows indicate water flow direction in three rivers. Codes refer to segments of individual rivers in which surveys were conducted.
